assertions.assertion: The response identifies the root cause as the API starting before IdentityServer is ready
assertions.rationale: Clearly states 'your API is starting before IdentityServer is ready'

assertions.assertion: The response recommends using .WaitFor(identityServer) on the API project in the AppHost
assertions.rationale: Code and explanation show `.WaitFor(identityServer)` on the API

assertions.assertion: The response recommends using .WithReference(identityServer) on the API project to make the endpoint URL available
assertions.rationale: Code and explanation show `.WithReference(identityServer)` on the API

assertions.assertion: The response mentions that IdentityServer needs health checks (e.g., MapHealthChecks or /health endpoint) for WaitFor to work
assertions.rationale: Dedicated section on health checks with AddHealthChecks() and MapHealthChecks("/health")
